headline: A Look Back at Beverages, Alcohol, and Tobacco Stocks’ Q1 Earnings: Keurig Dr Pepper (NASDAQ:KDP) Vs The Rest Of The Pack
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how Keurig Dr Pepper (NASDAQ:KDP) and the rest of the beverages, alcohol, and tobacco stocks fared in Q1.
